name: jobactivity
description: Read-only data source for the Activity page: lists recent runs of the framework's registered Databricks jobs (ail-apply-service, ail-l0-publish-scheduled), discovered by name via the SDK. Named 'jobactivity' (not 'jobs') to avoid colliding with the built-in AppKit jobs plugin during `appkit plugin sync`. Fail-closed — never fabricates a run, status, or duration; renders the SDK run state verbatim. The app SP needs job-run VIEW permission on those jobs, else each section fails closed with an honest 'no access' state.
